bio.en:
Hey, I'm keta — an indie developer who builds AI agent systems by day and farms virtual crops by night. You'll usually find me vibe coding with music on, crafting multi-agent frameworks while bouncing between playlists.

Beyond code, I'm a lifelong gamer — grew up commanding armies in Warcraft III: The Frozen Throne, got emotionally wrecked by Detroit: Become Human, roamed the wild frontier in Red Dead Redemption 2, caused chaos across Los Santos in GTA V. But my real comfort zone? Stardew Valley — where I've been tending the same farm for years, season after season.

I care deeply about how AI agents will reshape our economy and society — the future of work, technological disruption, and what it all means for everyday people. I follow the cutting edge closely, because I believe technology is what propels humanity into the unknown.
bio.zh:
嘿，我是 keta — 一个白天构建 AI Agent 系统、晚上种虚拟庄稼的独立开发者。日常就是戴着耳机 Vibe Coding，在音乐和代码之间来回切换。

代码之外，我是个老游戏迷 — 从小在冰封王座里指挥千军万马，在底特律：变人中经历灵魂拷问，在荒野大镖客里策马天涯，在 GTA V 里横行洛圣都。但最让我安心的还是星露谷 — 一年又一年，在那片农场里种地、钓鱼、过平静的日子。

我一直在关注 AI Agent 对经济和社会的深层影响 — 就业变革、技术冲击，以及这一切对普通人意味着什么。我持续追踪科技前沿，因为我相信技术终将带领人类走向更远的未来。

description.en: A Multi-Agent System built on the principles of Context Engineering.
description.zh: 基于 Context Engineering 原则构建的多智能体系统。

description.en: A role-playing language model specialized for survey research scenarios.
description.zh: 一款角色扮演模型，专用于问卷调查研究场景。

title.en: Simulating Macroeconomic Expectations using LLM Agents
title.zh: 使用 LLM 智能体模拟宏观经济预期

description.en: Can LLM agents simulate human macroeconomic expectations?
description.zh: 大模型智能体能模拟人类的宏观经济预期吗？
